resultList.dtldesc: Embrace a lifestyle of contemporary elegance in this spacious 3 BHK apartment located in the thriving Vaishnodevi Circle area of Ahmedabad. Situated within the well-planned Sreenand Residency 3, this property offers a perfect blend of modern architecture and functional design. Its strategic location in one of the citys most rapidly developing residential corridors ensures a peaceful domestic environment while maintaining excellent connectivity to major urban hubs.Property SpecificationsThis meticulously maintained apartment spans a super built-up area of 1,360 sq. ft and is positioned on the 4th floor of a 14-storey residential tower. The property is offered in an unfurnished condition, providing a versatile blank canvas for you to customise the interiors to your exact professional and personal tastes. The layout is thoughtfully designed to include three well-proportioned bedrooms and three modern bathrooms, ensuring ample privacy and comfort for the entire family. A private balcony offers refreshing views of the surrounding locality and ensures the home is filled with natural light and cross-ventilation throughout the day. Finished with high-quality vitrified flooring, the residence reflects a polished and sophisticated aesthetic in every room.FacilitiesThe apartment complex is equipped with a comprehensive range of facilities to ensure a seamless and secure living experience. Residents benefit from a reliable 24-hour water supply and a robust power backup system for common areas. Security is a top priority, featuring round-the-clock personnel and advanced CCTV surveillance monitoring the premises. Vertical movement is facilitated by high-speed lifts, and the property includes a dedicated covered parking space for vehicle safety. Additionally, the society offers a variety of lifestyle amenities, including a well-equipped gymnasium, a clubhouse for social gatherings, and a dedicated play area for children, all maintained to high professional standards.LocalitySituated at the iconic Vaishnodevi Circle, the property enjoys unparalleled connectivity to the SG Highway and the SP Ring Road, providing swift access to both Ahmedabad and Gandhinagar. The neighbourhood is a premier residential hub, home to several reputed educational institutions such as Nirma University and various international schools. For healthcare, top-tier hospitals and medical centres are located within immediate reach. The area is well-served by public transport and features a variety of shopping malls, supermarkets, and dining options, ensuring that all daily necessities and recreational needs are catered for in this vibrant and upscale neighbourhood.
